description_long: This is a realistic crab with a robust, rounded carapace that is dark brown on top and lighter orange on the underside and legs. The crab features two prominent claws, with the left claw being significantly larger and more robust than the right, a trait common in some crab species. Its eight walking legs are slender and jointed, radiating outward from the body and ending in pointed tips. The eyes are positioned on short stalks at the front of the carapace, giving the crab a wide field of view. The surface of the shell appears hard and slightly glossy, with subtle textural details and color gradations. No antennae are clearly visible in the images, and the crab's body is segmented into a cephalothorax and a small, tucked abdomen.
description: A lifelike crab with a dark brown carapace, large left claw, and eight slender orange legs. The shell is hard and slightly glossy, with eyes on short stalks.
description_view_0: Front view showing the crab's face, both claws (left claw larger), and symmetrical spread of legs.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the oversized left claw and the segmentation of the legs.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the rounded carapace and the arrangement of the legs from behind.
description_view_3: Right side view focusing on the smaller right claw and the curvature of the body and legs.
